name: NGI Belgium (geo.be)
dataType: Topographic maps, orthophotos, vector geodata, admin boundaries
description: Belgian federal geoportal providing topographic maps, orthophotos and vector geodata from the National Geographic Institute.

name: KMI/IRM Open Data (Royal Meteorological Institute Belgium)
dataType: SYNOP observations, AWS data, ALARO model, climate normals
description: Open meteorological data from Belgium's Royal Meteorological Institute including SYNOP, automatic weather station observations and ALARO NWP model outputs.

name: Geoportail de la Wallonie
dataType: Topographic maps, orthophotos, land use, environmental data, cadastre
description: Regional SDI for Wallonia providing topographic, environmental and planning data through the WalOnMap viewer and INSPIRE-compliant services.

name: Databank Ondergrond Vlaanderen (DOV)
dataType: Borehole logs, geology, geotechnics, groundwater, geothermics, soil
description: Flemish subsurface database offering over a thousand open data layers on soil, geology, geotechnics, groundwater and mineral resources.

name: data.gov.be (Belgian Federal Open Data Portal)
dataType: Administrative boundaries, transport, environment, statistics, geodata
description: Belgium's federal open data portal aggregating datasets from federal, regional and local administrations including geospatial data.

name: Geoportail.lu (Luxembourg National Geoportal)
operator: Administration du Cadastre et de la Topographie (ACT)
dataType: Cadastral plans, topographic maps, orthophotos, DTM, 3D buildings, geological maps
description: Luxembourg's national geoportal providing cadastral plans, topographic maps, orthophotos, 3D data and geological maps with a 3D viewer.

name: MeteoLux
operator: MeteoLux / Administration de la Navigation Aerienne
dataType: Climate normals, daily observations, weather forecasts, warnings
description: Luxembourg's meteorological service providing quality-controlled climate data from Luxembourg-Findel airport since 1947 via the national open data portal.

name: data.public.lu (Luxembourg Open Data Portal)
dataType: Geospatial data, transport, environment, demographics, addresses
description: Luxembourg's national open data portal with over 2300 datasets including geospatial, environmental and administrative data.

name: Ordnance Survey Ireland Open Data (Tailte Eireann)
dataType: Topographic maps, admin boundaries, gazetteer, building footprints, transport
description: Over 120 open geospatial datasets from Ireland's national mapping agency including boundaries, gazetteer and topographic data.

name: GeoHive (Ireland National Geospatial Data Hub)
dataType: Cross-sector geospatial data: environment, housing, economy, transport, health
description: Ireland's national geospatial data hub aggregating over 142 layers from 35 public sector bodies across environment, housing, economy and planning themes.

name: Met Eireann Open Data
dataType: Synoptic observations, radar, climate data, NWP forecasts
description: Over 2000 open datasets from Ireland's met service including synoptic observations, weather radar, NWP output and historical climate series.

name: Geological Survey Ireland (GSI)
dataType: Bedrock geology, quaternary, groundwater, geohazards, geophysics, marine geology
description: Ireland's national earth science data centre providing bedrock, quaternary, groundwater vulnerability, geohazard and marine geology datasets in ITM projection.

name: EPA Ireland Geoportal
dataType: Water quality, air quality, waste, noise, radiation, land cover, catchments
description: Ireland's EPA geoportal for environmental spatial data including water quality, air monitoring, waste licensing and catchment management layers.

name: MyPlan.ie (National Planning Portal)
operator: Department of Housing, Local Government and Heritage
dataType: Land use zoning, planning applications, development plans, protected areas
description: Ireland's national planning map portal providing zoning data from all 31 local authorities and 10 years of planning application data.

name: KNMI Data Platform
dataType: Weather observations, climate scenarios, satellite products, seismology, precipitation radar
description: Netherlands' national meteorological data platform providing weather observations, climate data, RACMO scenarios and satellite products via an Open Data API.

name: Rijkswaterstaat Waterinfo
dataType: Water levels, wave heights, flow rates, water quality, water temperature
description: Real-time and historical water monitoring data for Dutch state waters including water levels, waves, flows and quality from Rijkswaterstaat.

name: DINOloket (TNO Geological Survey of the Netherlands)
operator: TNO - Geological Survey of the Netherlands
dataType: Borehole logs, CPT data, groundwater, 3D geological models (DGM, REGIS II, GeoTOP)
description: Dutch national subsurface database with 430,000+ borehole logs, CPT data, groundwater levels and 3D geological models from the DINO repository.

name: CBS Geodata (Statistics Netherlands)
dataType: Municipal boundaries, neighbourhood statistics, population grids, land use statistics
description: Geospatial administrative boundaries and statistical area data from Statistics Netherlands, published via PDOK with annual boundary updates.

name: MeteoSwiss Open Data
operator: Federal Office of Meteorology and Climatology MeteoSwiss
dataType: Weather observations, climate normals, gridded datasets, radar, pollen, UV index
description: Swiss national meteorological open data with climate series dating back to 1864, 260 station network at 10-minute intervals and gridded climate analyses.

name: Swiss Geological Survey (swisstopo geology)
dataType: Geological maps (GA25, 1:500000), GeoCover vectors, 3D geological models
description: Geological Atlas of Switzerland at 1:25000 with over 200 map sheets, GeoCover vector data and 3D subsurface models via swissgeol.ch viewer.

name: DWD Climate Data Center (CDC)
dataType: Station observations, precipitation, temperature, wind, solar, phenology, gridded products
description: Germany's national climate data centre providing free access to station observations from ~2000 precipitation stations and gridded products via open FTP/HTTPS.

name: BGR Geoportal (Federal Institute for Geosciences)
dataType: Geological maps, soil maps, geophysics, groundwater, raw materials, geochemistry
description: Germany's federal geosciences geoportal offering geological, soil, geophysical, groundwater and raw materials maps at national to global scales.

name: BfG Geoportal (Federal Institute of Hydrology)
dataType: Hydrological data, water quality, sediment, ecology of federal waterways
description: Hydrological, ecological and water quality data for Germany's federal waterways (Rhine, Elbe, Weser, Danube, etc.) from the Federal Institute of Hydrology.

name: CODE-DE (Copernicus Data and Exploitation Platform Germany)
dataType: Sentinel-1/2/3/5P imagery, Copernicus service products
description: Germany's national Copernicus access platform mirroring all Sentinel satellite data with cloud processing and analysis capabilities.

name: Meteo-France Open Data
dataType: Station observations, radar composites, NWP models (AROME/ARPEGE), climate data
description: France's national meteorological open data with real-time access to 2000+ stations, 40 radars and AROME/ARPEGE NWP models, free since January 2024.

name: BRGM InfoTerre
operator: Bureau de Recherches Geologiques et Minieres (BRGM)
dataType: Geological maps (1:50000), subsoil databank (BSS), groundwater, natural hazards, mining sites
description: BRGM's geoscience data portal providing vectorised 1:50000 geological maps, the national subsoil database and thematic layers on hazards and groundwater.

name: IGN Geoservices / Geoportail
operator: Institut National de l'Information Geographique et Forestiere (IGN)
dataType: Topographic maps (SCAN25), orthophotos (BD ORTHO), DEM (RGE ALTI), road network, buildings
description: France's national mapping agency geoservices providing topographic maps, high-res orthophotos, DEMs, building data and INSPIRE-compliant web services.

name: Sandre / Eau France (Water Information System)
operator: Office Francais de la Biodiversite (OFB) / Sandre
dataType: Hydrometric stations, water quality, groundwater, aquatic ecology, water bodies
description: France's national water information reference system providing harmonised hydrological, water quality and ecological data across all French water bodies.

name: SHOM data.shom.fr (Marine & Coastal Data)
operator: Service Hydrographique et Oceanographique de la Marine (SHOM)
dataType: Bathymetry, tidal data, maritime boundaries, sedimentology, ocean currents, sea level
description: France's hydrographic service portal providing bathymetry, tidal observations, maritime boundaries and oceanographic data for the French EEZ.

name: Met Office Weather DataHub
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, UKV/MOGREPS NWP models, radar, climate projections
description: UK Met Office Weather DataHub API providing public-task weather data including observations, forecasts, radar and NWP model outputs (replacing DataPoint).

name: Met Office Climate Data Portal
dataType: UKCP18 climate projections, historical climate data, climate maps and indicators
description: Met Office climate data portal providing UKCP18 climate projections, historical climate datasets and interactive climate maps for the UK.

name: SEPA Open Data Hub (Scotland)
dataType: Flood risk, water quality, air quality, waste sites, contaminated land, licensed sites
description: SEPA's open spatial data hub for Scotland with ~30 datasets covering flood risk, water quality, air quality, waste and contaminated land.

name: Natural Resources Wales (NRW) / DataMapWales
dataType: Flood risk, habitats, woodland, peatland, water resources, protected areas
description: Wales environmental geospatial data portal providing flood risk, habitat, woodland, peatland and protected area datasets from Natural Resources Wales.

name: Scotland's Environment Map
dataType: 229 WMS layers: soil, air, water, habitats, land cover, noise, flooding
description: Scotland's environment map with 229 web map services from partner organisations covering soil, water, air, habitats and land cover themes.

name: Statbel Open Geodata (Statistics Belgium)
dataType: Statistical sectors, population density grids, census geodata, fiscal statistics by area
description: Belgium's statistical office providing georeferenced statistical sector boundaries, population grids and demographic data as open data.

name: Nationaal Georegister (NGR)
dataType: Metadata catalogue for all Dutch geospatial datasets and services
description: The Netherlands' national geo-register serving as the INSPIRE-compliant discovery catalogue for all Dutch geospatial datasets and web services.

name: Geoportal.de (German National SDI)
dataType: Metadata catalogue for German geospatial data: topography, admin boundaries, remote sensing
description: Germany's central national geoportal and INSPIRE access point aggregating geospatial datasets and services from federal and state authorities.

name: data.gov.ie (Ireland Open Data Portal)
dataType: Transport, health, environment, spatial, economy datasets from Irish public bodies
description: Ireland's national open data portal aggregating datasets from public bodies including Met Eireann, CSO, EPA and transport authorities.

name: opendata.swiss (Swiss Open Government Data)
dataType: Geospatial, environment, transport, population, energy datasets from Swiss authorities
description: Switzerland's federal open government data portal hosting datasets from swisstopo, MeteoSwiss, BFS and other federal offices including geospatial services.

name: Geoportail de l'Urbanisme (GPU)
operator: Ministere de la Transition Ecologique / IGN
dataType: Local urban plans (PLU/PLUi), zoning, servitudes, land-use regulations
description: France's national urban planning geoportal providing local urban plans, zoning regulations and public utility easements at parcel level.

name: Luxembourg Environment Portal (Emwelt.lu)
dataType: Water quality, Natura 2000, noise maps, air quality, flood risk, nature protection
description: Luxembourg's environmental data layers accessible via the national geoportal covering water, nature protection, noise, air quality and flood risk.

name: Environment Agency Data Services (England)
dataType: Flood risk, river levels, water quality, LiDAR, rainfall, bathing water
description: England's Environment Agency open data platform providing flood risk, real-time river levels, LiDAR DEMs, water quality and rainfall data.

name: Geopunt Vlaanderen (Flanders Geoportal)
dataType: Topographic maps, orthophotos, addresses, land use, admin boundaries, cadastre
description: Flanders' regional geoportal providing INSPIRE-compliant access to topographic, cadastral, address and land-use data with map viewer and download services.
